description: Comprehensive Tempo volume and throughput analytics. Spans received, bytes ingested, traces created, live traces, block count, compaction throughput, query volume, and growth trends.

panels.description: Total rate of spans received per second across all Tempo distributors.
panels.title: Spans Received/sec

panels.description: Total bytes received per second by Tempo distributors.
panels.title: Bytes Received/sec

panels.description: Rate of new traces created per second by Tempo ingesters.
panels.title: Traces Created/sec

panels.description: Total number of traces currently live in Tempo ingesters (in-memory, not yet flushed).
panels.title: Live Traces

panels.description: Total number of blocks in the Tempo block list across all compaction levels.
panels.title: Total Blocks

panels.description: Overall request rate across all Tempo routes.
panels.title: Request Rate

panels.description: Rate of spans received per second broken down by tenant, stacked to show total volume composition.
panels.title: Spans/sec by Tenant

panels.description: Rate of bytes received per second broken down by cluster, stacked to show total volume composition.
panels.title: Bytes/sec by Cluster

panels.description: Top 15 tenants ranked by spans received per second. Identifies the heaviest trace producers.
panels.title: Top 15 Tenants by Spans/sec

panels.description: Top 15 tenants ranked by bytes received per second. Identifies the heaviest data volume producers.
panels.title: Top 15 Tenants by Bytes/sec

panels.description: Number of live traces per ingester pod. Uneven distribution may indicate hash ring imbalance.
panels.title: Live Traces per Ingester

panels.description: Rate of bytes flushed from ingesters to backend storage. Indicates write throughput to object store.
panels.title: Flush Rate

panels.description: Block list length over time. Growth indicates increasing storage volume; sudden drops indicate compaction or retention.
panels.title: Block List Growth

panels.description: Compaction throughput: rate of objects combined and bytes written during compaction.
panels.title: Compaction Volume

panels.description: Request rate broken down by route, stacked. Covers query, search, and other API routes.
panels.title: Query Rate by Route

panels.description: Dual axis: query request rate (left Y) vs P95 query latency (right Y). Correlate volume spikes with latency degradation.
panels.title: Query Latency vs Volume

panels.description: Compare current span volume against the same period 7 days ago. Identifies growth or decline in trace ingestion.
panels.title: Span Volume — Current vs 7d Ago

panels.description: Rate of discarded spans broken down by reason. Identifies rate limiting, max trace size, and other rejection causes.
panels.title: Discarded Spans by Reason

title: Tempo — Volume & Throughput Analytics
